title: NEW DIGITAL SIGNATURE PROTOCOL BASED ON ELLIPTIC CURVES
author: Ounasser Abid
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: In this work, a new digital signature based on elliptic curves is presented. We established its efficiency and security. The method, derived from a variant of ElGamal signature scheme, can be seen as a secure alternative protocol if known systems are completely broken.
steps_raw: In this work, a new digital signature based on elliptic curves is presented. We established its efficiency and security. The method, derived from a variant of ElGamal signature scheme, can be seen as a secure alternative protocol if known systems are completely broken.
